name: Maxus Mining Corp.
description: Maxus Mining Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and advancement of economic mineral properties in premier jurisdictions. Headquartered in British Columbia, Canada, the company manages a diversified portfolio of approximately 15,098 hectares of prospective terrain. Their projects are primarily focused on critical minerals, including antimony, tungsten, and copper. By leveraging a highly experienced management team and targeting high-impact assets, Maxus Mining is committed to unlocking value through systematic exploration programs designed to address the growing global demand for critical minerals in sectors such as electrification, defense, and technology.
